creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
On Feburary 1st, ORBS removed relays.orbs.org from service and replaced it
with 8 new RBL sites.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

NOTE: Also, changed *.maps.vix.com -> *.mail-abuse.org
How-To-Repeat: 
Check a known open-relay with rblcheck and it will report that the server is
not in the relays.orbs.org RBL list.
